news.headline: Trump deletes image of himself as Jesus as feud with pope dismays US Catholics
news.summary: US President Donald Trump on Monday deleted a social media image depicting him as Jesus after an outcry from religious leaders that he was being blasphemous. news.headline: Benin's Wadagni wins presidency by landslide
news.summary: Electoral commission says Romuald Wadagni has won with over 94% of the vote with most ballots counted.
